scripts.check:backend: bun run --cwd backend typecheck && bun run --cwd backend test:contracts && bun run --cwd backend rules:validate
scripts.check: bun run check:backend && bun run check:web
scripts.check:go-live: bun run check && bun run --cwd backend db:health
scripts.format:check: bunx prettier --check README.md ROADMAP_STABILITY.md IMPLEMENTATION_CHECKLIST.md TECH_DECISIONS.md docs backend/src web/apps web/packages
